name: Qantas Airways Limited
description: Qantas Airways Limited is the flag carrier of Australia and the largest airline in the country by fleet size, international flights, and international destinations. Founded in 1920, it is one of the world's oldest continuously operating airlines and is widely recognized as the Spirit of Australia. Headquartered in Mascot, Sydney, the company operates an extensive domestic and international network, providing passenger and freight services. As a founding member of the oneworld airline alliance, Qantas maintains a strong reputation for safety, operational excellence, and its iconic kangaroo branding, serving as a vital link for Australia to the rest of the world.
